question: Will the commodity price fall below its six-month low this month?

requirements.claim_or_quantity: If the daily settlement price of the commodity (as reported by the primary exchange) on any day from 2023-08-01 to 2023-08-31 inclusive is strictly less than the lowest daily settlement price observed in the six months prior to 2023-08-01 (i.e., from 2023-02-01 to 2023-07-31), then outcome is price_
requirements.why_relevant: the terminal outcome standing as of the question date sets the base rate
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.80) driving the outcome distribution
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
high-sensitivity latent (0.70) driving the outcome distribution
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves
